brier_logloss.rule: Requires match-level 1X2 probabilities in the selected latest pre-match structured file.
brier_logloss.not_eligible_reason: Legacy prose/Markdown-only predictions without explicit 1X2 probabilities cannot support Brier/log-loss.

wdl_top3_only.rule: Use when there is explicit WDL direction and/or top score candidates but no full probability vector.

full_score_distribution.rule: Requires xG, Poisson 0-0 through 5-5/tail, 1X2 and top5 scorelines.

data_gaps_for_model_thread: Normalize every future prediction to match-level xG, probabilities_1x2, top_scorelines>=5, Poisson matrix and tail fields.
Backfill older prose predictions only for WDL/top3 if explicit score candidates are present; do not fabricate probabilities for Brier/log-loss.
Postmatch reviews with player_state_update_status not updated should remain partial in player-state-sensitive model audits.
Use latest pre-kickoff revision when both prose and quant files exist; keep superseded drafts out of scoring.
Some project Markdown files display historical encoding corruption in terminal output, so metric extraction should prefer parseable JSON when available.
